name: Fried Tortilla Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the corn tortillas in a stack and cut into 6 equal wedges.
2. Pour about 1/2 inch of salad oil into a deep, 2 or 3-quart pan and heat to medium-high.
3. When the oil is hot enough that a piece of tortilla sizzles when added, add the tortilla pieces by handfuls.
4. Stir to separate the pieces as they cook.
5. Cook until crisp for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes.
6. Using a slotted spoon, lift the chips from the oil and drain on paper towels.
